"use strict";
var __decorate = (this && this.__decorate) || function (decorators, target, key, desc) {
    var c = arguments.length, r = c < 3 ? target : desc === null ? desc = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(target, key) : desc, d;
    if (typeof Reflect === "object" && typeof Reflect.decorate === "function") r = Reflect.decorate(decorators, target, key, desc);
    else for (var i = decorators.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) if (d = decorators[i]) r = (c < 3 ? d(r) : c > 3 ? d(target, key, r) : d(target, key)) || r;
    return c > 3 && r && Object.defineProperty(target, key, r), r;
};
var __metadata = (this && this.__metadata) || function (k, v) {
    if (typeof Reflect === "object" && typeof Reflect.metadata === "function") return Reflect.metadata(k, v);
};
var __param = (this && this.__param) || function (paramIndex, decorator) {
    return function (target, key) { decorator(target, key, paramIndex); }
};
Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true });
exports.TrainingService = void 0;
const common_1 = require("@nestjs/common");
const prisma_service_1 = require("../../prisma/prisma.service");
const approval_engine_service_1 = require("../unified-approval/approval-engine.service");
let TrainingService = class TrainingService {
    constructor(prisma, approvalEngine) {
        this.prisma = prisma;
        this.approvalEngine = approvalEngine;
    }
    async createPlan(dto, userId) {
        await this.validatePlanYearUniqueness(dto.year);
        return this.prisma.trainingPlan.create({
            data: {
                year: dto.year,
                title: dto.title,
                status: 'draft',
                createdBy: userId,
            },
        });
    }
    async findPlans(dto) {
        const { page = 1, limit = 10 } = dto;
        const skip = (page - 1) * limit;
        const where = this.buildPlanQueryWhere(dto);
        const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
            this.prisma.trainingPlan.findMany({
                where,
                skip,
                take: limit,
                orderBy: { year: 'desc' },
                include: this.getPlanInclude(),
            }),
            this.prisma.trainingPlan.count({ where }),
        ]);
        return {
            items,
            total,
            page,
            limit,
            totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit),
        };
    }
    async findPlanById(id) {
        const plan = await this.prisma.trainingPlan.findUnique({
            where: { id },
            include: this.getPlanDetailInclude(),
        });
        if (!plan) {
            throw new common_1.NotFoundException('培训计划不存在');
        }
        return plan;
    }
    async updatePlan(id, dto) {
        const plan = await this.getPlanById(id);
        this.validatePlanIsDraft(plan, '修改');
        return this.prisma.trainingPlan.update({
            where: { id },
            data: dto,
        });
    }
    async deletePlan(id) {
        const plan = await this.prisma.trainingPlan.findUnique({
            where: { id },
            include: { projects: true },
        });
        if (!plan) {
            throw new common_1.NotFoundException('培训计划不存在');
        }
        this.validatePlanIsDraft(plan, '删除');
        if (plan.projects.length > 0) {
            throw new common_1.BadRequestException('该培训计划下有培训项目，无法删除');
        }
        await this.prisma.trainingPlan.delete({
            where: { id },
        });
        return { message: '删除成功' };
    }
    async submitPlanForApproval(id) {
        const plan = await this.getPlanById(id);
        if (plan.status !== 'draft') {
            throw new common_1.BadRequestException('只有草稿状态的培训计划可以提交审批');
        }
        try {
            const approval = await this.approvalEngine?.startApproval({
                resourceType: 'training_plan',
                resourceId: id,
                resourceStep: 'submit',
                triggerKey: 'submit',
                title: `培训计划审批：${plan.title}`,
                createdById: plan.createdBy,
            });
            if (approval) {
                await this.prisma.trainingPlan.update({ where: { id }, data: { approvalInstanceId: approval.id } });
            }
        }
        catch { }
        return this.prisma.trainingPlan.update({
            where: { id },
            data: { status: 'pending_approval' },
        });
    }
    async handleApprovalCompleted(id) {
        const plan = await this.getPlanById(id);
        return this.prisma.trainingPlan.update({
            where: { id },
            data: { status: 'approved' },
        });
    }
    async handleApprovalRejected(id) {
        const plan = await this.getPlanById(id);
        await this.prisma.todoTask.deleteMany({
            where: {
                type: 'approval',
                relatedId: id,
                status: 'pending',
            },
        });
        return this.prisma.trainingPlan.update({
            where: { id },
            data: { status: 'draft' },
        });
    }
    async resubmitPlanForApproval(id) {
        const plan = await this.getPlanById(id);
        await this.prisma.todoTask.deleteMany({
            where: {
                type: 'approval',
                relatedId: id,
                status: 'pending',
            },
        });
        try {
            const approval = await this.approvalEngine?.startApproval({
                resourceType: 'training_plan',
                resourceId: id,
                resourceStep: 'submit',
                triggerKey: 'submit',
                title: `培训计划审批：${plan.title}`,
                createdById: plan.createdBy,
            });
            if (approval) {
                await this.prisma.trainingPlan.update({ where: { id }, data: { approvalInstanceId: approval.id } });
            }
        }
        catch { }
        return this.prisma.trainingPlan.update({
            where: { id },
            data: { status: 'pending_approval' },
        });
    }
    async validatePlanYearUniqueness(year) {
        const existing = await this.prisma.trainingPlan.findUnique({
            where: { year },
        });
        if (existing) {
            throw new common_1.ConflictException(`${year}年度培训计划已存在`);
        }
    }
    async getPlanById(id) {
        const plan = await this.prisma.trainingPlan.findUnique({
            where: { id },
        });
        if (!plan) {
            throw new common_1.NotFoundException('培训计划不存在');
        }
        return plan;
    }
    validatePlanIsDraft(plan, action) {
        if (plan.status !== 'draft') {
            throw new common_1.BadRequestException(`只有草稿状态的培训计划可以${action}`);
        }
    }
    buildPlanQueryWhere(dto) {
        const where = {};
        if (dto.year)
            where.year = dto.year;
        if (dto.status)
            where.status = dto.status;
        return where;
    }
    getPlanInclude() {
        return {
            projects: {
                select: {
                    id: true,
                    title: true,
                    status: true,
                },
            },
        };
    }
    getPlanDetailInclude() {
        return {
            projects: {
                include: {
                    learningRecords: {
                        select: {
                            userId: true,
                            passed: true,
                            examScore: true,
                        },
                    },
                },
            },
        };
    }
    async createProject(dto, userId) {
        await this.getPlanById(dto.planId);
        if (dto.documentIds && dto.documentIds.length > 0) {
            await this.validateDocuments(dto.documentIds);
        }
        const project = await this.prisma.trainingProject.create({
            data: {
                planId: dto.planId,
                title: dto.title,
                description: dto.description,
                department: dto.department,
                quarter: dto.quarter,
                trainerId: dto.trainerId,
                trainees: dto.trainees,
                scheduledDate: dto.scheduledDate ? new Date(dto.scheduledDate) : null,
                documentIds: dto.documentIds || [],
                passingScore: dto.passingScore || 60,
                maxAttempts: dto.maxAttempts || 3,
                status: 'planned',
            },
        });
        await this.createLearningRecordsForTrainees(project.id, dto.trainees);
        await this.createTodoTasksForProject(project);
        return project;
    }
    async findProjects(dto) {
        const { page = 1, limit = 10 } = dto;
        const skip = (page - 1) * limit;
        const where = this.buildProjectQueryWhere(dto);
        const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
            this.prisma.trainingProject.findMany({
                where,
                skip,
                take: limit,
                orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
                include: {
                    plan: {
                        select: { year: true, title: true },
                    },
                    learningRecords: {
                        select: {
                            id: true,
                            userId: true,
                            passed: true,
                            examScore: true,
                        },
                    },
                },
            }),
            this.prisma.trainingProject.count({ where }),
        ]);
        return {
            items,
            total,
            page,
            limit,
            totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit),
        };
    }
    async findProjectById(id) {
        const project = await this.prisma.trainingProject.findUnique({
            where: { id },
            include: {
                plan: true,
                questions: {
                    orderBy: { order: 'asc' },
                },
                learningRecords: {
                    include: {
                        examRecords: {
                            orderBy: { submittedAt: 'desc' },
                        },
                    },
                },
                archive: true,
            },
        });
        if (!project) {
            throw new common_1.NotFoundException('培训项目不存在');
        }
        return project;
    }
    async updateProject(id, dto) {
        const project = await this.getProjectById(id);
        if (project.status === 'completed' || project.status === 'cancelled') {
            throw new common_1.BadRequestException('已完成或已取消的培训项目无法修改');
        }
        if (project.status === 'ongoing' && Object.keys(dto).some(key => key !== 'trainees')) {
            throw new common_1.BadRequestException('进行中的培训项目只能修改学员名单');
        }
        if (dto.documentIds && dto.documentIds.length > 0) {
            await this.validateDocuments(dto.documentIds);
        }
        const updated = await this.prisma.trainingProject.update({
            where: { id },
            data: {
                ...dto,
                scheduledDate: dto.scheduledDate ? new Date(dto.scheduledDate) : undefined,
            },
        });
        if (dto.trainees) {
            await this.syncLearningRecords(id, dto.trainees);
        }
        return updated;
    }
    async deleteProject(id) {
        const project = await this.getProjectById(id);
        if (project.status !== 'planned') {
            throw new common_1.BadRequestException('只有计划中的培训项目可以删除，其他状态请使用取消功能');
        }
        await this.prisma.$transaction([
            this.prisma.todoTask.deleteMany({
                where: {
                    type: { in: ['training_organize', 'training_attend'] },
                    relatedId: id,
                },
            }),
            this.prisma.learningRecord.deleteMany({
                where: { projectId: id },
            }),
            this.prisma.trainingProject.delete({
                where: { id },
            }),
        ]);
        return { message: '删除成功' };
    }
    async addTrainees(id, userIds) {
        const project = await this.getProjectById(id);
        const newTrainees = Array.from(new Set([...project.trainees, ...userIds]));
        if (newTrainees.length > 100) {
            throw new common_1.BadRequestException('学员数量不能超过100人');
        }
        const updated = await this.prisma.trainingProject.update({
            where: { id },
            data: { trainees: newTrainees },
        });
        await this.createLearningRecordsForTrainees(id, userIds);
        await this.createTodoTasksForNewTrainees(project, userIds);
        return updated;
    }
    async removeTrainee(id, userId) {
        const project = await this.getProjectById(id);
        if (!project.trainees.includes(userId)) {
            throw new common_1.BadRequestException('该用户不在学员列表中');
        }
        const updated = await this.prisma.trainingProject.update({
            where: { id },
            data: {
                trainees: project.trainees.filter((t) => t !== userId),
            },
        });
        await this.prisma.learningRecord.deleteMany({
            where: { projectId: id, userId },
        });
        await this.prisma.todoTask.deleteMany({
            where: {
                type: 'training_attend',
                relatedId: id,
                userId,
            },
        });
        return updated;
    }
    async updateProjectStatus(id, status) {
        const project = await this.getProjectById(id);
        this.validateProjectStatusTransition(project.status, status);
        const data = { status };
        if (status === 'completed') {
            data.completedAt = new Date();
        }
        return this.prisma.trainingProject.update({
            where: { id },
            data,
        });
    }
    async getProjectById(id) {
        const project = await this.prisma.trainingProject.findUnique({
            where: { id },
        });
        if (!project) {
            throw new common_1.NotFoundException('培训项目不存在');
        }
        return project;
    }
    buildProjectQueryWhere(dto) {
        const where = {};
        if (dto.planId)
            where.planId = dto.planId;
        if (dto.department)
            where.department = dto.department;
        if (dto.status)
            where.status = dto.status;
        if (dto.quarter)
            where.quarter = dto.quarter;
        return where;
    }
    async validateDocuments(documentIds) {
        const documents = await this.prisma.document.findMany({
            where: {
                id: { in: documentIds },
            },
            select: {
                id: true,
                status: true,
            },
        });
        if (documents.length !== documentIds.length) {
            throw new common_1.BadRequestException('部分培训资料不存在');
        }
        const unpublishedDocs = documents.filter((doc) => doc.status !== 'published');
        if (unpublishedDocs.length > 0) {
            throw new common_1.BadRequestException('只能引用已发布的文档作为培训资料');
        }
    }
    async createLearningRecordsForTrainees(projectId, trainees) {
        const existingRecords = await this.prisma.learningRecord.findMany({
            where: { projectId },
            select: { userId: true },
        });
        const existingUserIds = new Set(existingRecords.map((r) => r.userId));
        const newTrainees = trainees.filter(userId => !existingUserIds.has(userId));
        if (newTrainees.length > 0) {
            await this.prisma.learningRecord.createMany({
                data: newTrainees.map(userId => ({
                    projectId,
                    userId,
                    examScore: 0,
                    attempts: 0,
                    passed: false,
                })),
            });
        }
    }
    async syncLearningRecords(projectId, newTrainees) {
        const existingRecords = await this.prisma.learningRecord.findMany({
            where: { projectId },
        });
        const existingUserIds = new Set(existingRecords.map((r) => r.userId));
        const newTraineesSet = new Set(newTrainees);
        const toDelete = existingRecords.filter((r) => !newTraineesSet.has(r.userId));
        if (toDelete.length > 0) {
            await this.prisma.learningRecord.deleteMany({
                where: {
                    id: { in: toDelete.map((r) => r.id) },
                },
            });
        }
        await this.createLearningRecordsForTrainees(projectId, newTrainees);
    }
    async createTodoTasksForProject(project) {
        const tasks = [];
        tasks.push({
            userId: project.trainerId,
            type: 'training_organize',
            relatedId: project.id,
            title: `组织培训：${project.title}`,
            description: `您需要组织并实施培训项目"${project.title}"`,
            status: 'pending',
            priority: 'normal',
            dueDate: project.scheduledDate,
        });
        for (const traineeId of project.trainees) {
            tasks.push({
                userId: traineeId,
                type: 'training_attend',
                relatedId: project.id,
                title: `参加培训：${project.title}`,
                description: `您需要参加培训并通过考试`,
                status: 'pending',
                priority: 'normal',
                dueDate: project.scheduledDate,
            });
        }
        await this.prisma.todoTask.createMany({ data: tasks });
    }
    async createTodoTasksForNewTrainees(project, userIds) {
        const tasks = userIds.map(userId => ({
            userId,
            type: 'training_attend',
            relatedId: project.id,
            title: `参加培训：${project.title}`,
            description: `您需要参加培训并通过考试`,
            status: 'pending',
            priority: 'normal',
            dueDate: project.scheduledDate,
        }));
        await this.prisma.todoTask.createMany({ data: tasks });
    }
    validateProjectStatusTransition(currentStatus, newStatus) {
        const validTransitions = {
            planned: ['ongoing', 'cancelled'],
            ongoing: ['completed', 'cancelled'],
            completed: [],
            cancelled: [],
        };
        if (!validTransitions[currentStatus]?.includes(newStatus)) {
            throw new common_1.BadRequestException(`无法从 ${currentStatus} 状态转换到 ${newStatus} 状态`);
        }
    }
};
exports.TrainingService = TrainingService;
exports.TrainingService = TrainingService = __decorate([
    (0, common_1.Injectable)(),
    __param(1, (0, common_1.Optional)()),
    __metadata("design:paramtypes", [prisma_service_1.PrismaService,
        approval_engine_service_1.ApprovalEngineService])
], TrainingService);
//# sourceMappingURL=training.service.js.map
Code coverage generated by istanbul at 2026-05-14T16:25:09.466Z
